mapper.select:
SELECT SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TE011+(SFCTE.UDF51+SFCTE.UDF52+SFCTE.UDF53)),0)AS INT) count FROM SFCTD LEFT JOIN SFCTE ON TE001 = TD001 AND TE002 = TD002
TD005 = 'Y'
AND SFCTE.UDF01 LIKE '%金工%' AND SFCTE.UDF06 = '割管'
AND SFCTE.UDF01 LIKE '%综合%' AND SFCTE.UDF06 = '配口'
AND SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TC003, 1, ${type} ) date ,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TE005),0)AS INT) count FROM MOCTC LEFT JOIN MOCTE ON TC001 = TE001 AND TC002 = TE002 LEFT JOIN PURMA ON TC006 = MA001 AND TC008 = '55'
TC009 = 'Y'
AND MA002 like '%方同喜%'
AND MA002 like '%顾浩%'
AND SUBSTRING ( TC003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TC003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TC003, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TC003, 1, ${type} ) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TE005),0)AS INT) count FROM MOCTC LEFT JOIN MOCTE ON TC001 = TE001 AND TC002 = TE002 LEFT JOIN CMSMD ON TC005 = MD001
TC001 = 5410 AND TC009 = 'Y' AND MD002 = '喷漆车间'
AND SUBSTRING ( TC003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TC003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TC003, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TE011+(SFCTE.UDF51+SFCTE.UDF52+SFCTE.UDF53)),0)AS INT) count FROM SFCTD LEFT JOIN SFCTE ON TE001 = TD001 AND TE002 = TD002
SFCTE.UDF01 = '喷漆' AND SFCTE.UDF06 LIKE '%检验%' AND TD005 = 'Y'
AND SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TE011+(SFCTE.UDF51+SFCTE.UDF52+SFCTE.UDF53)),0)AS INT) count FROM SFCTD LEFT JOIN SFCTE ON TE001 = TD001 AND TE002 = TD002
TD005 = 'Y'
AND SFCTE.UDF01 LIKE '%金工%' AND SFCTE.UDF06 = '平口底'
AND SFCTE.UDF01 LIKE '%综合%' AND SFCTE.UDF06 = '一次测温'
AND SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TH003, 1, ${type} ) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TI019),0)AS INT) count FROM MOCTH LEFT JOIN PURMA ON TH005 = MA001 LEFT JOIN MOCTI ON TH001 = TI001 AND TH002 = TI002
TH023 = 'Y'
AND MA002 like '%方同喜%'
AND MA002 like '%顾浩%'
AND TH010 NOT LIKE '%脱漆%'
AND SUBSTRING ( TH003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TH003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TH003, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TA003, 1, ${type} ) date, COUNT(*) count FROM MOCTA LEFT JOIN MOCTB ON TA001 = TB001 AND TA002 = TB002 LEFT JOIN CMSMD ON TA021 = MD001
TA013 = 'Y' AND TA001='5210'
AND SUBSTRING ( TA003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
AND MD002='综合车间'
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TA003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TA003, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TE011+(SFCTE.UDF51+SFCTE.UDF52+SFCTE.UDF53)),0)AS INT) count FROM SFCTD LEFT JOIN SFCTE ON TE001 = TD001 AND TE002 = TD002
SFCTE.UDF01 = '喷漆' AND SFCTE.UDF06 LIKE '%检验%' AND TD005 = 'Y'
AND SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TD003, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TF003, 1, ${type} ) date , CAST(ROUND(SUM(TF024),0)AS INT) count FROM MOCTF
TF006 = 'Y'
AND SUBSTRING ( TF003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TF003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TF003, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TL003, 1, ${type} ) date, CAST(ROUND(SUM(TM007),0)AS INT) count FROM INVTL LEFT JOIN INVTM ON TM001 = TL001 AND TL002 = TM002
TL014 = 'Y'
AND INVTL.UDF01 = SUBSTRING('${workCenter}', 1, 4)
AND SUBSTRING ( TL003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TL003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TL003, 1, ${type} )
